---
title: "Resources"
pagetitle: "Resources — Bingjin Xue"
---

## Data Visualizations

::: {.resource}
### EITC × Minimum Wage Budget Lines
<div class="resource-meta">Interactive visualization · EITC × MW project</div>

<details class="resource-body">
<summary>Description</summary>

The visualization plots annual budget constraints for a married couple with two children. It compares the federal EITC schedule with state minimum wages and state EITC top-ups, making the policy interaction visible as shifts in kink locations and plateau heights.
</details>

<div class="actions">
[Open visualization](resources/eitc-mw-budget-lines.html){target="_blank" aria-label="Open EITC minimum wage budget lines visualization"}
</div>
:::
